purpose: Input contract for skills/goal/scripts/itd_goal_score.py. Five points are binary: quality, efficiency, memory, understanding, and integrity. FIVE_STAR requires all five; thresholds are hard-coded in the evaluator so a run cannot grade itself by weakening its config.
integrityRequirements: pair ids exactly cover the frozen oracle task ids
manual_first and loop_first orders are both represented
manual and loop commit/tree/prompt/environment digests match per pair
memory controlIsolated is true and stateReadViolations is zero
delayed quiz timestamp is at least 24 hours after the immediate quiz
budget test evidence path matches its sha256
